concepts.name: a raw chunk of amber with a trapped air bubble inside
concepts.blurb: twenty million years of held breath

concepts.name: a cracked glass photographic plate negative
concepts.blurb: the image held, the surface didn't

concepts.name: a small paper fairy cutout with scissor-fringe wings
concepts.blurb: cut from nothing, held by nothing

concepts.name: a rusted tin box with a corroded latch
concepts.blurb: the thing that kept it shut failed first

concepts.name: a single long hatpin with a black jet bead at the tip
concepts.blurb: all that length for one small dark thing

concepts.name: a yellowed letter folded into thirds and never opened
a child's leather shoe with a broken lace
concepts.blurb: one side tied, one side loose

concepts.name: a stopped brass pocket watch with a dented case
concepts.blurb: one mark where time pressed too hard
